description: Convert the legacy shell script at '/home/ga/monitoring-stack/run_commands.sh' into a 'docker-compose.yml' file in the same directory. Faithfully translate all configurations for Prometheus, Grafana, and Node Exporter, including networks, ports, volumes, environment variables, restart policies, and bind mounts. Ensure the stack is running via Docker Compose and all services are accessible on their respective ports (9090, 3000, and 9100).
